description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the gcc Docker image. Define a single stage called build and a job named build that runs in the build stage. The job should execute the following shell commands in order: pwd; commits=`git log -1 --pretty=format:"%H %P"`; git diff --name-only $commits > changed_files.txt; changed_dir=`python yenart/scripts/get_dir.py changed_files.txt`; echo $changed_dir; cd $changed_dir; make. The job should store the resulting mybinary file as a build artifact. No caches, services, or special rules are required.
